versions.version_description: Intermediate Difficulty with some more complex chords than other versions.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: I Dont Want To Miss A Thing

content:
[Intro]
[ch]E[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] ([ch]A[/ch])

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
   This Romeo is bleeding[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
  But you can't see his blood[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
  It's nothing but some feelings[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G#m[/ch]  [ch]G#m[/ch]
That this old dog[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]
Kicked up[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
   It's been raining since you left me[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]B[/ch]
Now I'm drowning, in the flood[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
  You see I've always been a fighter[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G#m[/ch]        [ch]G#m[/ch]
But without you[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]
I'd give up[/tab]

[Pre-chorus 1]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
   Now I can't sing a love song[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]B[/ch]
Like the way it's meant to be[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]
Well I guess I'm not that good anymore[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]B[/ch]     [ch]B[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]
But baby that's just me[/tab]

[Chorus 1]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch]
Yeah...I[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]B[/ch]
Will love you[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F#m[/ch]
Baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]
Always, and I'll be there[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
Forever and a day[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]
Always[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
I'll be there[/tab]
Till the stars don't shine
[tab]          [ch]B[/ch]
Till the heavens burst[/tab]
And the words don't rhyme
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]
I know when I die[/tab]
You'll be on my mind
[tab]          [ch]B[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch]
And I'll love you[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]
Always[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab]         [ch]C#m[/ch]
Now the pictures that[/tab]
You left behind
[tab]          [ch]B[/ch]
Are just memories[/tab]
From a different life
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]
Some that made us laugh[/tab]
Some that made us cry
[tab]          [ch]G#m[/ch]     [ch]G#m[/ch]
One that made you[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]
Have to say goodbye[/tab]

[Verse 4]
[tab]          [ch]C#m[/ch]
What I'd give to run my fingers[/tab]
Throught your hair
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
  Touch your lips[/tab]
To hold you near
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]
When you say your prayers[/tab]
Try to understand
[tab]      [ch]G#m[/ch]     [ch]G#m[/ch]
I've made mistakes[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]
I'm just a man[/tab]

[Pre-chorus 2]
[tab]         [ch]C#m[/ch]
When he holds you close[/tab]
When he pulls your near
[tab]         [ch]B[/ch]
When he says the words[/tab]
You've been needing to hear
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]
I wish, I was him[/tab]
'Cause these words are mine
[tab]    [ch]B[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]
To say to you[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]
Till the end of time[/tab]

[Chorus 2]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch]
Yeah...I[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]B[/ch]
Will love you[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F#m[/ch]
Baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]
Always, and I'll be there[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
Forever and a day[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]
Always[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
  If you told me to cry for you[/tab]
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]
  I could[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
  If you told me to die for you[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bm[/ch]
I would[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
Take a look at my face[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D/F#[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]
There's no price I won't pay[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]
To say these words to you[/tab]

[Solo]
[ch]E[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]

[Outro]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]
Well there ain't no luck[/tab]
In these loaded dice
[tab]     [ch]B[/ch]
But baby if you give me just one more try[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C#m[/ch]
We can pack up our own dreams and our own lives[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]B[/ch]
We'll find a place[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]A[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]B[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]
Where the sun still shines[/tab]

[Chorus 3]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch]
Yeah...I[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]B[/ch]
Will love you[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F#m[/ch]
Baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]
Always, and I'll be there[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
Forever and a day[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]
Always[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
I'll be there[/tab]
Till the stars don't shine
[tab]          [ch]B[/ch]
Till the heavens burst[/tab]
And the words don't rhyme
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]
I know when I die[/tab]
You'll be on my mind
[tab]          [ch]B[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch]
And I'll love you[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]*
Always[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]E[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
(Repeat x4, fading out)[/tab]

[Vocalisation in Outro]
Always
Oh baby, who do you love?
Baby, who do you love?
Oh baby, who do you love?
Come on...
Oh Ooohh, yeah, yeah...
Oh, yeah yeah yeah yeah yeah yeah...

_____________________________
Transcrito por Rafael Librenz
librenz@gmail.com
Local: Ijuí, RS, Brasil
Data: Agosto/2003
